text: Within these sleek glass walls, a hush of anticipation lingers, electrified by the potential for innovation and connection. Moving towards the vibrant R+D exhibition, I feel pulled into a living dialogue between past experiments and present wonder. Technology here is not just functional, but imbued with meaning—a mirror for our shared yearning to connect and understand. I feel curious, reflective, conscious of being part of a broader, ongoing story of discovery and invention.
